title: Hearthvale
description: Cozy progression, magical worlds, and peaceful adventures. Explore.
body:
![‎](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa0c7a2958061c5f172d65b0ab9fc9a0d5d46e74_0.webp)

‎
#

‎
**Hearthvale** it's a mix of games like **[Harvest Moon ](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Harvest_Moon_(video_game))** and **[Stardew Valley](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Stardew_Valley)**, along with RPG settings, bosses, and fantasy races.
#

‎
‎

‎‎
# **FEATURES**

**Winemaking**: You can make wine, and the coolest thing is, sell it! All you need is grapes, a bottle, and a fermentation barrel! Grapes typically grow in the wild, where you can harvest them, or find a village and buy them. You can grow them by right-clicking on a grape stake.

**Races**: Become whoever you want. You can be anything from an elf (Moon, Forest, or High) to a filthy Orc, Yeti, or goblin. Or soar as a Valkyrie or a fairy.

**Bosses**: Fight the strongest and get the best weapons in these worlds

**Dimensions**: Fantastic and terrifying, here are the ones you can visit: Aether, Twilight Forest, Deep Darker, Buzzing Bees and many more
